creative_brief: Split image: left shows industrial cold storage facility with calendar pages, right shows fresh beef cuts at bright FarmThru hub with Rachel's Farm branding visible.
primary_text: 14 days. That's how long supermarket beef sits in cold storage before reaching your kitchen. Add the 2,400km journey from feedlot to shelf, and you're eating meat that's weeks old. FarmThru beef comes straight from Rachel's Farm in Kempsey. 100% grass-fed, pasture-raised, no middlemen. Days old, not weeks. Collect from Brookvale hub Monday to Friday. No commitment required.
headline: 14 days in cold storage before you buy it
description: Rachel's Farm beef reaches Brookvale in days, not weeks. 100% grass-fed, pasture-raised. Not financial advice.
